title: Lego's latest Nintendo collab is a playable Donkey Kong arcade machine - Engadget
summary: Next off the production line is a brick-built tribute to the arcade game that started it all, with the 1,371-piece Lego Donkey Kong Arcade. The $200 Lego Donkey Kong Arcade launches August 1, and is available to pre-order now.
caption: output/2026-07-23/lego-s-latest-nintendo-collab-is-a-playable-donkey-kong-arcade-machine.txt
